gameTitle: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time - Master Quest

achievements.title: Treestone
achievements.description: Obtain the Kokiri Emerald.

achievements.title: Darunia's Best Buddy
achievements.description: Obtain the Goron Ruby.

achievements.title: Too Cool for this Pond
achievements.description: Obtain the Zora Sapphire.

achievements.title: Light of the Goddess
achievements.description: Transform into an adult for the first time, and obtain the Light Medallion.

achievements.title: The Kid of the Forest
achievements.description: Obtain the Forest Medallion.

achievements.description: Obtain the Fire Medallion.

achievements.description: Obtain the Shadow Medallion.

achievements.description: Obtain the Spirit Medallion.

achievements.title: Questing Master
achievements.description: Beat The Game with all Medallions and Spiritual Stones.

achievements.title: The Parasitic Armored Arachnid: Gohma
achievements.description: Defeat Gohma without using the Z-Target.

achievements.description: Defeat King Dodongo without using the Z-Target and without using Deku Sticks.

achievements.title: Bio-Electric Anemone: Barinade
achievements.description: Defeat Barinade without using the Z-Target.

achievements.title: Evil Spirit from Beyond: Phantom Ganon
achievements.description: Defeat Phantom Ganon without using the Z-Target and without using the Fairy Bow.
achievements.author: Pelouch

achievements.title: Subterranean Lava Dragon: Volvagia
achievements.description: Defeat Volvagia without using the Z-Target and without using Jumpslashes.

achievements.title: Giant Aquatic Amoeba: Morpha
achievements.description: Defeat Morpha without using the Z-Target on Morpha.

achievements.title: Phantom Shadow Beast: Bongo Bongo
achievements.description: Defeat Bongo Bongo without using the Z-Target and without using Jumpslashes.

achievements.title: Sorceress Sisters: Twinrova
achievements.description: Defeat Twinrova without using the Z-Target and without falling off the Platform.

achievements.title: Using the Environment
achievements.description: Beat the Deku Tree using only Deku Nuts, Deku Sticks, Deku Shield and a single Shot with the Fairy Slingshot without leaving the Dungeon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Extreme Morpha
achievements.description: Defeat Morpha using the Master Sword while having only 3 Heart Containers and without using the C-Buttons or Healing Items.
achievements.author: AlexHylian

achievements.title: Extreme Bongo
achievements.description: Defeat Bongo Bongo using the Master Sword while having only 3 Heart Containers and without using the C-Buttons or Healing Items.
achievements.author: AlexHylian

achievements.title: Extreme Ganon
achievements.description: Defeat Ganon while having only 3 Heart Containers and without using the C-Buttons or Healing Items.
achievements.author: AlexHylian

achievements.title: The Power of Deku Nuts
achievements.description: Get Ganon down to 1 HP by using only Deku Nuts while having only 3 Heart Containers and without using the B-Button or Healing Items.
achievements.author: AlexHylian

achievements.title: You Can Be Strong
achievements.description: Defeat Ganon after obtaining all Spiritual Stones and Medallions while having only 3 Heart Containers and without any Deaths or collecting Nayru's Love.
achievements.author: AlexHylian

achievements.description: Discover Impa's Secret in her House.

achievements.description: Win the Cucco Mini-Game in the Lon Lon Ranch before the Clock reaches 10 Seconds.

achievements.description: Kill the Composer Brothers and listen to their Fate.

achievements.description: Win the Race against Dampé before the Clock reaches 56 Seconds.

achievements.description: Win the Race on the Lon Lon Ranch in 49 Seconds or less.

achievements.description: Hand over the Odd Mushroom before the Clock reaches 1:45 without using Epona.

achievements.description: Hand over the Eyeball Frog before the Clock reaches 0:50 without using Epona.

achievements.description: Hand over the World's Finest Eye Drops before the Clock reaches 0:30 without using Epona.

achievements.description: Finish the Running Man's Challenge before the Clock reaches 1:44 without using Epona.

achievements.description: Clear the Shooting Gallery as Young Link without missing any Shot.

achievements.title: Super Nintendo Bros
